title: gh#60: R1.5 — Sweep: delete old publish services and shared classifiers
reasoning:
Imported from https://github.com/joshgk00/social-media-scheduler/issues/60.
Backlog section: Candidate 1 — Publisher seam.

## Context

Final PR in Candidate 1. Removes the now-dead code paths once R1.4 has been merged and tests stay green. Also overlaps with existing issue #14 (extract shared Twitter client factory) — close #14 as superseded by this work.

## Scope

Deletions:
- `packages/worker/src/twitter-publish.service.ts`
- `packages/worker/src/linkedin-publish.service.ts`
- `packages/worker/src/facebook-publish.service.ts`
- `packages/shared/src/lib/error-classifier.ts` exports for `classifyTwitterError`, `classifyLinkedInError`, `classifyFacebookError` (kept private inside each Publisher)
- `ClassifiedError` type, if no other consumers remain — verify with \`rg ClassifiedError\`. If consumers exist outside the Publishers, leave the type and audit those callers in a follow-up issue.

Updates:
- `packages/shared/src/index.ts` — drop the deleted re-exports
- Any test files referencing the deleted services — verify removed cleanly, no orphaned imports
- Close gh#14 (extract shared Twitter client factory) — superseded by this candidate

## Out of scope

- Behavior changes (R1.4 already delivered them)
- TokenVault (deferred per ADR-0002)

## Acceptance

- `pnpm --filter @sms/worker build` passes
- `pnpm --filter @sms/shared build` passes
- `rg "twitter-publish.service|linkedin-publish.service|facebook-publish.service"` returns no matches in src
- gh#14 closed with reference to this PR

## References

- ADRs: [0001](../blob/main/docs/adr/0001-publish-failure-is-thrown-not-returned.md), [0002](../blob/main/docs/adr/0002-publisher-receives-raw-profile-row.md)
- Closes #14
- Depends on: #59
